name: Select
purpose: Single-choice dropdown for filters, data source switching, period selection, and entity facets.

structures.name: Trigger
structures.notes: Closed state mirrors Text Input metrics with a trailing chevron token.

structures.name: Menu
structures.notes: Popover uses the popover token surface; selected option carries a leading check.

structures.name: Grouped Menu
structures.notes: Optional uppercase mono group labels for source or category grouping.

interactionNotes: Open state borrows the focus ring halo; chevron rotates on open.
Selected option uses accent surface plus a check rather than bold weight alone.
